Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants 20 open ended questions about the smartphone supply chain process described in the pseudo BPMN

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The questions should cover rationale improvements risk management decision making stakeholder communication and performance measurement

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First I need to understand the process flow It starts with market research then RD for the prototype Then there is a parallel gateway for securing components from different regions After securing all they ship to Malaysia for assembly Then quality checks which might lead to rework or continue Then packaging parallel split for air and cargo shipping customs distribution centers various distribution methods inventory monitoring and finally adjusting orders or proceeding

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the main areas to cover are why certain steps are done how to improve risks in each part decision points communication between stakeholders and how to measure performance

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Starting with the initial steps Why is market research the first step What if it is done after RD Maybe that is a question

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also why split the component sourcing into different regions Maybe to diversify suppliers but that could introduce risks

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Questions about the rationale for parallel gateways in sourcing and distribution

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Risk management What are the risks in securing components from different countries Supply chain disruptions geopolitical issues trade regulations

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How to mitigate those

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Decision making points The quality check gateway is a key point

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What criteria determine if a product passes How is the rework process handled What if rework fails again

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Stakeholder communication How do different departments like RD procurement and distribution communicate What happens if there is a delay in one part of the supply chain

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Performance measurement How do they measure efficiency in assembly Quality metrics Lead times from order to delivery Inventory turnover

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also the process loops back from quality checks to assembly Why is that necessary What if the rework is too frequent

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In the distribution phase splitting into different methods like air freight and cargo ships

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What factors determine which method to use How does that affect cost and delivery time

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The final step involves adjusting orders based on sales

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How is demand forecasting done What if the forecast is wrong

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Need to make sure each question is open ended and thought provoking not yes no Avoid technical terms like SQL as instructed

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me start drafting some questions ensuring they touch on all the mentioned areas Maybe 20 in total covering each aspect Need to check for variety and depth Let me list them out and see if they fit
